prestazioni: Engine swap to a Mercedes-Benz M113K 5.4L V8 (engine code: 113.992) with a custom billet crankshaft from Manley Performance, forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 compression), and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods for 800+ HP capability on E85 fuel. Pair with a Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger (0.92 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 4-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Armytrix with quad 100mm outlets and electronically controlled valves for backpressure optimization.

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a Quaife ATB differential (QDF7Z) with 3.92:1 final drive ratio, upgraded CV joints from The Driveshaft Shop (Stage 3), and a Tilton Engineering twin-disc carbon clutch (7.25" diameter) with a billet flywheel for 1,200 Nm torque capacity. Transmission upgrade to a Mercedes-Benz 722.6 5-speed automatic with a PWR Performance Products transmission cooler and a custom TCU tune by HP Tuners for 0.15-second shift times.

Suspension overhaul with Öhlins TTX46 coilovers (2-way adjustable damping, 200mm travel) paired with custom-machined aluminum top mounts from Cusco. Front and rear sway bars from Ultra Racing (25mm front, 22mm rear) with spherical bearings, and a full polybush kit from SuperPro (part #SPF0116K) for zero compliance. Braking system upgrade to AP Racing CP9660 calipers (6-piston front, 4-piston rear) with 380mm two-piece rotors and Ferodo DS3000 pads, plumbed with Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel lines.
estetica: Full custom widebody conversion by Liberty Walk (LB-GENEVA kit) with carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, all finished in a 3-stage pearl white with hand-painted gold leaf accents. Side skirts and rear bumper extensions are 3D-printed from ABS plastic with a textured finish for weight savings and durability.

Custom LED headlight assembly by LUX Automotive, featuring bi-xenon projectors with adaptive cornering lights, sequential turn signals, and a carbon fiber housing. Rear taillights replaced with a full-width LED bar by Diode Dynamics, integrated into a custom carbon fiber trunk spoiler with a Gurney flap for downforce. Side mirrors replaced with carbon fiber units from Seibon, featuring integrated cameras and blind-spot monitoring.

Interior rework with a full Alcantara headliner and Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shell, 6-point harnesses) upholstered in Nappa leather with gold stitching. Custom dashboard overlay by Varis with a digital gauge cluster from AIM MXS Strada (1.3" display) and a MoTeC C127 dash logger. Steering wheel replaced with a Momo Prototipo (350mm diameter) wrapped in Alcantara with a quick-release hub from NRG Innovations.
